name: pitch_360_check
description: Pitch equivalent of yaw_360_check.json -- not for pixel-tracking, a before/after landmark-position check instead. Holds full pitch for exactly 360/68=5.2941176s, the duration a full 360deg rotation should take at the coded maxAngVel.pitch (68 deg/s, matching shipTypes.ts's own '360/68 deg/s = 5.294s ideal' comment) if reached and held throughout. Motivated by the pitch_reversal.json fit implying a peak steady-state rate (~110-120 deg/s) far above the coded spec -- before trusting that, check whether SUSTAINED pitch actually reaches ~68 deg/s the way yaw's equivalent check confirmed ~52 deg/s for yaw (a landmark should return to ~its starting screen position after this hold if the spec is right; a large systematic shortfall would mean sustained pitch is genuinely slower than spec, not just a short-reversal-maneuver artifact).
